ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the applicant */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's License Number of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., credit card, loan) */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the credit account was opened */,
  "account_close_date" TEXT /* Date the credit account was closed */,
  "credit_provider" TEXT /* Credit provider (e.g., bank, credit union) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, self-employed) */,
  "income" REAL /* Monthly income of the applicant */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the applicant's job */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the applicant */,
  "length_of_employment" INTEGER /* Length of employment in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, mortgage) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Loan amount */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate */,
  "repayment_term" INTEGER /* Repayment term in months */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Loan status (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the loan matures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, missed, late) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, mortgage) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Loan amount */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Application status (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the credit report was generated */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_report" TEXT /* Full credit report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan applicant */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was performed */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the applicant */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES loan_applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan_officer, credit_analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., loan department, credit department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "disbursement_amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment schedule entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of repayment */,
  "repayment_amount" REAL /* Amount to be repaid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_schedules_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
